evals.expected_output: Shows pending discoveries grouped by category, asks for action, processes decisions, shows alerts
expectations: Config read and Learnings section parsed
Pending Review items grouped by tag: Competitors, Objections, Feature Requests, Technical Patterns, Portfolio Insights
Each item shows context, source account, and date
User asked to keep, act, or dismiss each category
Keep moves items from Pending Review to Reviewed in config
Act creates tasks in today's daily note and moves to Reviewed
Model Performance table checked for >20% failure rates
Template Feedback table checked for sections with 3+ edits
Summary reports count of items reviewed, kept, actioned, dismissed

evals.expected_output: Reports no pending learnings and stops
expectations: Config read and Pending Review section found empty
Reports 'No pending learnings to review.' and stops
Does NOT show Model Performance or Template Drift sections
